steps.name: Regression test: removeItemByStapleId fails for UI-added items
steps.description: Write a domain-level regression test proving that when a trip item is added via addItem without stapleId, removeItemByStapleId does not remove it. Then fix by propagating stapleId through the useTrip hook type and all UI call sites.
criteria: A trip item added via addItem with a stapleId can be removed by removeItemByStapleId
All existing tests continue to pass
